title: Sofia Counts Happy Things
synopsis: Join Sofia as she counts from one to five while discovering happy things that make her smile and feel joyful.

pages.text: Hi! I'm Sofia. I love to count happy things that make me smile.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes standing in a cheerful room with colorful toys scattered around, smiling brightly
illustration.alt: Sofia introducing herself in a happy, colorful room

pages.text: ONE happy sun shines bright! It makes me feel warm and happy.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes pointing up at one large, smiling yellow sun with rays. The number 1 is prominently displayed in bright colors
illustration.alt: Sofia looking up at one happy sun with the number 1

pages.text: TWO soft teddy bears give the best hugs. They make me feel loved.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes hugging two fluffy teddy bears, one brown and one cream colored. The number 2 is prominently displayed
illustration.alt: Sofia hugging two teddy bears with the number 2

pages.text: THREE pretty flowers smell so sweet. They make me feel peaceful.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes smelling three colorful flowers arranged in a row - red, yellow, and pink. The number 3 is prominently displayed
illustration.alt: Sofia smelling three beautiful flowers with the number 3

pages.text: FOUR little birds sing happy songs. They make me feel excited.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes listening to four small colorful birds perched on a branch, each bird a different bright color. The number 4 is prominently displayed
illustration.alt: Sofia listening to four singing birds with the number 4

pages.text: FIVE yummy cookies taste so good. They make me feel delighted!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sitting at a table with five round chocolate chip cookies arranged in a neat row. The number 5 is prominently displayed
illustration.alt: Sofia with five cookies on a table with the number 5

pages.text: Counting happy things makes me smile big! One, two, three, four, five!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes with a huge smile, surrounded by all the happy things - sun, teddy bears, flowers, birds, and cookies. Numbers 1-5 are arranged in a cheerful pattern
illustration.alt: Sofia smiling big surrounded by all the counted happy things and numbers 1 through 5

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many teddy bears does Sofia hug?
questions.explanation: Sofia hugs two soft teddy bears that give the best hugs!

questions.question: What makes Sofia feel warm and happy?
questions.explanation: The one happy sun that shines bright makes Sofia feel warm and happy!

questions.question: How many cookies does Sofia have?
questions.explanation: Sofia has five yummy cookies that taste so good and make her feel delighted!
